1002.name: Outlash
1002.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 2 <sprite name="Enhancement"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Enhancement">Attack Power Up</color></link></u> and 2 <sprite name="Vulnerable"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vulnerable">Fragile</color></link></u>
1002.panicDesc: Turn Start: Random ally loses 20 SP.

1003.name: Overwhelmed
1003.panicDesc: Does not act for this turn.

1006.name: Running
1006.lowMoraleDesc: Does not act. When hit, this unit is defeated after the skill ends.

1008.name: Maddened
1008.lowMoraleDesc: When at low morale for the first time, targets units indiscriminately
1008.panicDesc: Targets indiscriminately; Clash Power +1, and gain 2 <sprite name="AttackDmgUp"><color=#f8c200><u><link="AttackDmgUp">Damage Up</color></link></u>

1009.name: Suicidal
1009.lowMoraleDesc: When at low morale for the first time, become unable to act
1009.panicDesc: Cannot act for 3 turns. After 3 turns, unit dies at turn start; all its allies lose additional 10 SP with every SP loss condition

1010.name: Wandering
1010.lowMoraleDesc: Turn End: Deal 2 SP damage to allies
1010.panicDesc: Turn End: Deal 5 SP damage to allies. Flees from battle after 3 turns have passed

1011.name: Unstable
1011.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 2 <sprite name="Enhancement"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Enhancement">Attack Power Up</color></link></u> and 3 <sprite name="Binding"><color=#e30000><u><link="Binding">Bind</color></link></u>

1012.name: Dejection
1012.lowMoraleDesc: Gain 1 <sprite name="Vulnerable"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vulnerable">Fragile</color></link></u>; In a clash, if any Coin lands tails, Clash Power -1 for the clash.
1012.panicDesc: Gain 3 <sprite name="Vulnerable"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vulnerable">Fragile</color></link></u>; In a clash, if any Coin lands tails, Clash Power -3 for the clash.

1013.name: Impurity
1013.lowMoraleDesc: Gain 1 <sprite name="Vulnerable"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vulnerable">Fragile</color></link></u>. Target loses 2 SP if this unit loses the clash
1013.panicDesc: Gain 1 <sprite name="Vulnerable"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vulnerable">Fragile</color></link></u>. Target loses 5 SP if this unit loses the clash

1014.name: Vengeance
1014.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 1 <sprite name="Enhancement"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Enhancement">Attack Power Up</color></link></u> and 3 <sprite name="DefenseDown"><color=#e30000><u><link="DefenseDown">Defense Level Down</color></link></u>. Gain <sprite name="AttackDmgUp"><color=#f8c200><u><link="AttackDmgUp">Damage Up</color></link></u> based on the amount of damage taken last turn (1 <sprite name="AttackDmgUp"><color=#f8c200><u><link="AttackDmgUp">Damage Up</color></link></u> for every 3% of Max HP lost)
1014.panicDesc: Turn Start: Gain 2 <sprite name="Enhancement"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Enhancement">Attack Power Up</color></link></u> and 6 <sprite name="DefenseDown"><color=#e30000><u><link="DefenseDown">Defense Level Down</color></link></u>. Gain <sprite name="AttackDmgUp"><color=#f8c200><u><link="AttackDmgUp">Damage Up</color></link></u> based on the amount of damage taken last turn (1 <sprite name="AttackDmgUp"><color=#f8c200><u><link="AttackDmgUp">Damage Up</color></link></u> for every 3% of Max HP lost)

1015.name: Pallid Panic
1015.panicDesc:
Every Turn End: Gain 2 <sprite name="Binding"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Binding">Bind</color></link></u>.
Every Coin this unit flips lands on tails.

1017.name: Organization Compulsion
1017.lowMoraleDesc: Lose 5 SP on Clash Lose. Gain 1 [Agility] next turn when hit (max 2)
1017.panicDesc: Gain 2 [Vulnerable]. Gain 1 [Agility] next turn when hit (max 3)

1018.name: Echoes of the Manor
1018.lowMoraleDesc: Clash Power -1 on self. Deal +10% damage on Heads Hit

1020.name: Splitting
1020.lowMoraleDesc: Lose 2 HP on self with every Clash. Gain 1 [AttackUp] at Turn Start.
1020.panicDesc: Lose 3 HP on self with every Clash. Gain 2 [AttackUp] at Turn Start.

1022.name: Hatred
1022.lowMoraleDesc:
Clash Win: Gain 1 [AttackUp] next turn. (3 times per turn)
Clash Lose: Gain 1 [DefenseUp]. (3 times per turn)
1022.panicDesc:
Clash Win: Gain 1 [AttackUp] this turn and next turn (3 times per turn)
Clash Lose: Gain 1 [DefenseUp] (3 times per turn)
Turn End: Gain 2 [Agility] next turn

1024.name: Broken Unity
1024.lowMoraleDesc: Gain 1 [Vulnerable]. Gain +1 [Vibration] Count when hit. (3 times max)
1024.panicDesc: Gain 2 [Vulnerable]. Gain +2 [Vibration] Count when hit. (3 times max)

1026.name: Ruin
1026.lowMoraleDesc: Gain 3 [Sinking] at every Turn End; Clash Power -1
1026.panicDesc: Gain 5 [Sinking] and +3 [Sinking] Count at every Turn End; Clash Power -2

1027.name: Hunger
1027.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 1 [Binding] and 2 [Enhancement]. Take 5 SP damage at Turn End

1028.name: Duel Specialist
1028.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 2 [AttackUp]. On Clash Lose, gain 1 [DefenseDown] (max 3 per turn). Min. Speed -1
1028.panicDesc: Turn Start: Gain 4 [AttackUp]. On Clash Lose, gain 2 [DefenseDown] (max 6 per turn). Min. Speed -1

1029.name: Guilt
1029.lowMoraleDesc: Turn End: gain 1 [Vulnerable] and [MentalIncreaseDown] next turn
1029.panicDesc: Turn End: gain 2 [Vulnerable] and [MentalIncreaseDown] next turn.

1030.name: Bridle of Nihility
1030.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: gain 1 [Enhancement] and 3 [DefenseDown]. Take 5 SP at Turn End.
1030.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 2 [Enhancement] and 6 [DefenseDown]. Heal 10 SP at Turn End.

1031.name: Resanguination
1031.lowMoraleDesc: If the target does not have [Laceration], Clash Power -1; On Hit, heal HP equal to [Laceration] Potency on the target
1031.panicDesc: If the target has [Laceration], Clash Power +2; if the target does not have [Laceration], Clash Power -2; On Hit, heal HP equal to [Laceration] Potency on the target

1032.name: Guilt
1032.lowMoraleDesc: Turn End: gain 1 [Vulnerable] and [MentalIncreaseDown] next turn
1032.panicDesc: Turn End: gain 2 [Vulnerable] and [MentalIncreaseDown] next turn.

1033.name: Reawakening Joy Of Carnage
1033.lowMoraleDesc: Every Turn Start: gain 2 [AttackUp]; +2 SP Efficiency
1033.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 6 [DefenseUp], and gain 3 [AttackUp] next turn

1034.name: Burden of Responsibility
1034.lowMoraleDesc:
- Gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [Vulnerable]; raise Max Speed value by 2
- Heal +30% more HP when healing
- Turn End: if the [RegainedStrength] is lower than its value at Turn Start, gain 2 [AttackUp] and [DefenseDown] next turn
1034.panicDesc:
- Gain 2 [Enhancement] and raise Max Speed value by 2
- Heal +50% more HP when healing
- Turn End: if the [RegainedStrength] is lower than its value at Turn Start, gain 3 [AttackUp] and 5 [DefenseDown] next turn

1035.name: The Church
1035.lowMoraleDesc:
Gain 1 additional [Smoke] or [Smoke] Count when gaining them.
Turn Start: gain 3 [Vulnerable], 2 [AttackDmgUp], and 1 [Endurance].
1035.panicDesc:
Gain 2 additional [Smoke] or [Smoke] Count when gaining them.
Turn Start: gain 3 [Vulnerable], 4 [AttackDmgUp], and 2 [Endurance].

1037.name: Candy
1037.lowMoraleDesc: When Clashing against Identities with [CandyForCharon], Clash Power +3; when clashing against other Identities, Clash Power -1
1037.panicDesc: When Clashing against Identities with [CandyForCharon], Clash Power +5; when clashing against other Identities, Clash Power -2

1039.name: Deception
1039.lowMoraleDesc: If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's or when using an Unopposed Attack, deal +10% damage against the target
1039.panicDesc: If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's or when using an Unopposed Attack, deal +20% damage against the target; if this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, take -20% damage

1040.name: Podao
1040.lowMoraleDesc: Take +10% damage from Unopposed Attacks; deal +30% damage with Counterattacks
1040.panicDesc: Take +20% damage from Unopposed Attacks; deal +50% damage with Counterattacks

1042.name: Charge Circuitry Countercurrent

1042.panicDesc: When Clashing against targets with [Burst], gain +5 [Charge] Count, 1 [AttackDmgUp], and 2 [Vulnerable] (2 times per turn)

1044.name: Heart of Evil

Clash Power +2 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable]
1044.panicDesc:
Clash Power +3 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 3 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Vulnerable]

1045.name: Heart of Oppressive Evil

Clash Power +2 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 3 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable]
1045.panicDesc:
Clash Power +3 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 4 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Vulnerable]

1047.name: Jia Qiu
1047.lowMoraleDesc: Deal +10% damage against targets that aren't Hong Lu
1047.panicDesc: Deal +20% damage against targets that aren't Hong Lu

1049.name: Beastly Instinct
1049.lowMoraleDesc:
Deals +(HP percentage difference / 2)% damage to targets with higher HP percentages that this unit's (max 10%)
Turn Start: gain 1 [Enhancement], 1 [AttackDmgUp], and 1 [Vulnerable]
1049.panicDesc:
Deals +(HP percentage difference)% damage to targets with higher HP percentages that this unit's (max 25%)
Turn Start: gain 1 [PlusCoinValueUp], 2 [AttackDmgUp], and 2 [Vulnerable]

1050.name: Le Regole
1050.lowMoraleDesc:
If this unit inflicted 2+ [Vibration] last turn, gain 1 [AmberDamageUp]
If this unit inflicted 2+ [Combustion] last turn, gain 1 [CrimsonDamageUp]
If this unit failed to inflict anything, gain 2 [DefenseDown]
1050.panicDesc:
If this unit inflicted 2+ [Vibration] last turn, gain 2 [AmberDamageUp]
If this unit inflicted 2+ [Combustion] last turn, gain 2 [CrimsonDamageUp]
If this unit failed to inflict anything, gain 3 [DefenseDown]

1052.name: Heart Toward the New Era
1052.lowMoraleDesc: On Hit, consume 3 SP on self to inflict 2 [Sinking]

1053.name: Inherited Will of Hongyuan
1053.lowMoraleDesc:
All Parts gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [Binding]
- When the Body Part loses a Clash against Hong Lu: the Body Part gains 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per turn)
1053.panicDesc:
All Parts gain 2 [Enhancement] and 2 [Binding]
- When the Body Part loses a Clash against Hong Lu: the Body Part gains 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per turn)

1054.name: Infinitely Bequeathing Will of Hongyuan
1054.lowMoraleDesc:
Gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [Vulnerable]
Units generated by this unit gain 3 [DefenseDown]
Deal +20% damage. If the Palanquin Part's HP drops to 0, deal -10% damage instead
1054.panicDesc:
Gain 2 [Enhancement] and 2 [Vulnerable]
Units generated by this unit gain 6 [DefenseDown]
Deal +30% damage. If the Palanquin Part's HP drops to 0, deal -15% damage instead

1055.name: Double-edged Feather

1055.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 2 Fragile and 2 HP Healing Boost. On Hit, inflict 1 Rupture and 1 Bleed

1056.name: Angst
1056.lowMoraleDesc:
Clash Power +2 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable]
1056.panicDesc:
Clash Power +3 against targets with [OminousTalisman]
Turn Start: gain 3 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Vulnerable]

1058.name: Charge Order

1058.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 2 [Vulnerable] and apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] to all allies

1059.name: Unbridled Steed
1059.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 1 max Speed, gain 2 [AttackUp], and 2 [Vulnerable]

1060.name: Night Drifter of the Drunken Palm
1060.lowMoraleDesc: Take +10% damage from Jia Xichun; deal +30% damage with Counterattacks
1060.panicDesc: Final Power +1; take +20% damage from Jia Xichun; deal +50% damage with Counterattacks

1061.name: Heart of Compassion

- Deal +([NervousImpairment] on target / 2)% damage (max 15%)
- Turn Start: gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Vulnerable]
1061.panicDesc:
- Deal +([NervousImpairment] on target)% damage (max 30%)
- Turn Start: gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 3 [Vulnerable]

1062.name: Call of the Bloodkin

1062.panicDesc: Turn End: consume 5% HP and gain 1 [Vulnerable] to apply 1 [Enhancement] and 1 [Vulnerable] to all allies

1063.name: Candy

1063.panicDesc: When Clashing against Identities with [GiveMeCandy], Clash Power +5; when clashing against other Identities, Clash Power -2

1064.name: Hive Mind
1064.panicDesc:
All Resistances change to 'Normal'
Double the amount of [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], and [Burst] Potency gained due to Skill effects

Clash Power +1 when Clashing against targets with [DuelEdge]
Clash Lose: Gain 1 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per turn)
1068.panicDesc:
Clash Power +2 when Clashing against targets with [DuelEdge]
Clash Lose: Gain 2 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per turn)

1070.name: Affection and Resentment
1070.lowMoraleDesc: Deal +10% damage to and take +10% damage from Ryōshū
1070.panicDesc: Deal +20% damage to and take +10% damage from Ryōshū

Deal +20% damage to [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality]
Take +10% damage from those who are not [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality]
1072.panicDesc:
Deal +30% damage to [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality]
Take +20% damage from those who are not [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality]

1073.name: Wave of Somnolence
1073.panicDesc: Does not act for this turn

1075.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 2 [Enhancement] and 4 [DefenseDown]; gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] for every 30 HP damage taken last turn (max 5)
1075.panicDesc: Turn Start: Gain 3 [Enhancement] and 5 [DefenseDown]; gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] for every 25 HP damage taken last turn (max 5)

1076.panicDesc: Turn Start: Gain 1 [Enhancement] and 3 [DefenseDown]; gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] for every 25 HP damage taken last turn (max 5)

1077.name: Outmoded Art
1077.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Lose 5 HP and gain 1 [AttackUp]
1077.panicDesc: Turn Start: Lose 15 HP and gain 2 [AttackUp]

1078.name: Shame of the Family

Turn Start: Gain 1 [SlashDamageUp], 1 [ParryingResultUp], and 1 [Vulnerable]
Cannot gain Mang when using Skills
1078.panicDesc:
Turn Start: Gain 2 [SlashDamageUp], 2 [ParryingResultUp], and 2 [Vulnerable]
Cannot gain Mang when using Skills

1080.name: Of the Second Smoke War

Turn Start: Gain 1 [Vulnerable]
SP Heal Efficiency +2

1081.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: Gain 1 [Vulnerable] and apply 2 [Endurance] to Ezra and Vespa

- Turn Start: Gain 5 [Combustion] and 5 [Laceration]
- Take +10% damage from Sinner Ryōshū
1084.panicDesc:

- Take +20% damage from Sinner Ryōshū

9994.name: Love and Hate
9994.panicDesc: Does not act for this turn.

9995.name: Catching Breath
9995.lowMoraleDesc: Turn Start: gain 2 [DefenseUp] and lose 2 [Breath] Potency
9995.panicDesc: Turn Start: gain 5 [DefenseUp] and lose 5 [Breath] Potency

9996.name: Thorns
9996.panicDesc: On Clash Win, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp]. At Turn End, gain 2 [ParryingResultUp] next turn.
